tests.scenario: Display content access type before playback for a free session
steps: Navigate to a meditation session marked as free
Observe the access information shown before playback
tests.expected_result: The session details clearly indicate that the content is free before the user starts playback.

tests.scenario: Display content access type before playback for paid or donation based content
steps: Navigate to a meditation session that is donation based or requires payment
Observe the access information shown before playback
tests.expected_result: The session details clearly indicate that the content is donation based or requires payment before playback begins.

tests.scenario: Allow playback of free content without payment
steps: Navigate to a free meditation session
tests.expected_result: The free meditation session starts without requiring payment or subscription.

tests.scenario: Do not block access to free content with a payment prompt
steps: Attempt to open and play the content
tests.expected_result: The system allows access to the free content and does not force the user to make a payment.

tests.scenario: Show sleep category in the app
steps: Navigate to the content categories or browse section
Review the list of available categories
tests.expected_result: A sleep category is visible to the user.

tests.scenario: Show stress relief and anxiety categories in the app
steps: Navigate to the content categories or browse section
Review the list of available categories
tests.expected_result: Stress relief and anxiety related categories are visible to the user.

tests.scenario: Start a calming session from the home screen within three steps
steps: Open the app to the home screen
Select a visible calming category or recommended session
tests.expected_result: The user is able to start a calming session within three interactions from the home screen.

tests.scenario: Verify easy access to a calming session during stress
steps: Open the app to the home screen
Look for quick access options for stress, anxiety, or calming sessions
Start one of the suggested sessions
tests.expected_result: A calming session can be started quickly from the home screen without unnecessary navigation.

tests.scenario: Provide beginner friendly guided courses
steps: Navigate to the courses or guided content section
tests.expected_result: The app provides at least one structured beginner meditation course with guided sessions.

tests.scenario: Allow a new user to identify where to start
steps: Open the app as a new user
Navigate to the main content or course area
Look for beginner focused guidance or entry points
tests.expected_result: The system presents clear beginner friendly guidance or a structured starting point for new users.

tests.scenario: Update progress after completing a session
steps: Return to the course overview page
tests.expected_result: The course progress is updated to reflect the completed session.

tests.scenario: Preserve progress across sessions
steps: Reopen the app and return to the same course
tests.expected_result: The system retains and displays the user's previously recorded course progress.

tests.scenario: Play a meditation session without unexpected audio interruption
steps: Allow the session to play for several minutes
tests.expected_result: The audio continues without stopping unexpectedly during the session.

tests.scenario: Maintain stable playback during normal session use
steps: Play the session from beginning to end
tests.expected_result: The session plays from start to finish without crashes or playback interruptions.

tests.scenario: Show an error message when playback fails
steps: Simulate or trigger a playback failure
tests.expected_result: The system displays a clear error message when playback fails.

tests.scenario: Provide recovery options after playback failure
steps: Simulate or trigger a playback failure
tests.expected_result: The system provides an option to resume or restart the session after playback failure.

tests.scenario: Display multiple categories of meditation content
steps: Navigate to the browse or content section
Review the available categories and session types
tests.expected_result: The system displays multiple meditation categories and content types for users to browse.

tests.scenario: Allow users to explore a variety of session options
steps: Navigate to the browse or discover section
Inspect the list of available sessions
tests.expected_result: The user can browse a wide range of session options instead of only a limited set.

tests.scenario: Ensure no intrusive ads appear during navigation
steps: Navigate through the home screen, categories, and session pages
Observe whether any intrusive advertisements appear
tests.expected_result: No intrusive advertisements are displayed while the user navigates the app.

tests.scenario: Ensure no intrusive ads appear during meditation playback
steps: Observe the screen and playback experience during the session
tests.expected_result: No intrusive advertisements interrupt the user during meditation playback.
